task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus interface is visible, and the user profile or login indicator shows 'administrator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Work Log Types configuration page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Admin or Setup section is open, specifically showing the 'Work Log Types' or 'Time Spent Types' settings page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the form to create a new Work Log Type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, dialog, or page titled 'New Work Log Type', 'Add Work Log Type', or similar is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct name for the Work Log Type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'On-Site Repair' is typed into the Name input field of the form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description input field contains text that includes the keywords: 'physical equipment', 'repair', 'maintenance', and 'client location'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct hourly rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '150' or '150.00' is typed into the Cost, Rate, or Hourly Rate input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the new Work Log Type was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message/toast is displayed, or 'On-Site Repair' is visible as a saved entry in the list of Work Log Types.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface of the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for name, description, and rate must be entered into the actual application form fields, not a separate text editor like Notepad or gedit.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the application's list view updated with the new entry or a genuine application success notification, rather than just an unsubmitted form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Name: 'On-Site Repair'. Target Rate: 150.0. Target Description Keywords: 'physical equipment', 'repair', 'maintenance', 'client location'.
